Sun's and Mercury's positions, the native will very easily draw money from
the people. But, he will not be able to accumulate any wealth.
Saturn's and Ketu's position in Aries, the second house from Jupiter
causes Sanyasa Yoga and so the native will not marry. During the years 35,
36 and 46 of his age, he will consort with women; but without any happiness.
His pride will be the cause of his fall and misery. After his 44th year of age,
the native will travel abroad extensively. He will live to his 80th year of age.
